examples: A number of techniques developed since the 1950s, however, have placed the study of these subjects on a sounder and more objective footing.
Mr Huckabee's ideas on health care are considerably sounder, and he sells them deftly.
Indian companies are more dynamic better managed and financially sounder than Chinese enterprises.
Borrowing to finance a transition to a sounder system would be the responsible thing to do.
They must, at the same time, create growth and put their economy on a sounder basis.
